item.title: Cinnamon Swirl Coffee Cake
item.description: Ingredients Cake Mixture 2 eggs 1 cup milk 1 cup sugar 4 tbsp. vegetable shortening (melted) 2 cups flour 4 tsp. baking powder salt Cinnamon Sugar Mixture 1 cup sugar 2 tsp. cinnamon Directions Grease bottom and sides of dutch oven, or use parchment liner. Beat two eggs in bowl and add to dutch oven. Add milk, sugar, and melted vegetable shortening to the dutch oven. Stir and mix together. Add flour, baking powder and a dash of salt.
